Record Class MemoryInfo.PhysicalMemoryModule

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
io.joshuasalcedo.os.domain.hardware.MemoryInfo.PhysicalMemoryModule
Enclosing class:
MemoryInfo
public static record MemoryInfo.PhysicalMemoryModule(String bankLabel, long capacity, long clockSpeed, Manufacturer manufacturer, String memoryType) extends Record
Value object for individual physical memory sticks/modules.

  • Constructor Details

    • PhysicalMemoryModule

      public PhysicalMemoryModule(String bankLabel, long capacity, long clockSpeed, Manufacturer manufacturer, String memoryType)
      Creates an instance of a PhysicalMemoryModule record class.
      Parameters:
      bankLabel - the value for the bankLabel record component
      capacity - the value for the capacity record component
      clockSpeed - the value for the clockSpeed record component
      manufacturer - the value for the manufacturer record component
      memoryType - the value for the memoryType record component

  • Method Details

    • capacityFormatted

      public String capacityFormatted()

    • clockSpeedFormatted

      public String clockSpeedFormatted()

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with the compare method from their corresponding wrapper classes.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
